race.comment: ICONIFY (4) broke the maiden status over this mile journey last time out and winning rider Martyn stays in the saddle. Again gets the benefit of her claim and can go right on with the job now. Goes on top. PINK VIXEN (11) didn't measure up in G3 company at the latest effort but will find this assignment much more to her liking. Watch for sharp improvement. AND I AM (5) has put back-to-back wins together and is racing high on confidence of late. Can easily bring up the hat-trick against this line-up. CLIVE'S GLORY (9) boasts a win around this circuit and is usually thereabouts. A must for the multiples. DRACENA (1) next in line with the claim.
